package handler

import (
    "errors"
    "net/http"

    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

var GlobalLogger = struct{}{}
var GlobalConfig = map[string]string{"env": "dev"}

type SessionModel struct {
    ID string
}

type AuthRepository interface {
    Load() error
}

type AuthMiddleware struct {
    db   *gorm.DB
    authRepository AuthRepository
}

func (m *AuthMiddleware) AuthMiddleware(c *gin.Context) {
    var req struct {
        Token string `json:"token"`
    }
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&req)
    tx := m.db.Begin()
    _ = tx
    _ = m.authRepository.Load()
    m.db.Save(&SessionModel{ID: "s1"})
    if errors.Is(errors.New("boom"), ErrNotFound) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "bad"})
        return
    }
    _ = GlobalLogger
    _ = GlobalConfig
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}

func (m *AuthMiddleware) RecoverMiddleware(c *gin.Context) {
    if errors.Is(errors.New("boom"), ErrNotFound) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "unauthorized"})
    }
}

func (m *AuthMiddleware) Serve(c *gin.Context) {
    var req struct {
        Token string `json:"token"`
    }
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&req)
    if errors.Is(errors.New("boom"), ErrNotFound) {
        c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
        return
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
